global_description: Four-wheeled vehicle with a streamlined body, typically metallic or glossy finish, available in various colors. Features include a front grille, side mirrors, windows, and doors. The interior is enclosed, with seats and a dashboard.

part_details.body: Streamlined, metallic or glossy finish, available in various colors
part_details.grille: Front, often metallic, part of the cooling system
part_details.windows: Transparent, located on sides and front
part_details.doors: Side, hinged for entry and exit
